info.description: FAQ pages, grouped anywhere on the site via the `section` field. pathSlug sets the public URL; MDX is always stored flat under src/content/faqs/ (or faqs/es/).

title.description: Used for the browser tab title and breadcrumb label.

pathSlug.description: Path relative to the chosen Section. For section: foundation, this is the full path from the site root (e.g. grant/education/on-campus/faq). For summit or hackathon, leave off the summit/ or hackathon/ prefix — it's added automatically based on Section.

section.description: Site section for routing and breadcrumbs. Does not affect MDX file location.

heading.description: The heading shown at the top of the FAQ page. Can differ from the page title.

description.description: Short description used for SEO and card text. Aim for 120–160 characters.

introParagraph.description: Optional intro paragraph shown below the heading.

faqSections.description: At least one section required. Each section needs a heading and at least one question/answer pair.
